reviews.review_description: This game sucks and it's the worst. whenever i try to hit the ball it goes in a different direction from where i'm hitting it.
Hate is game don’t play this game

I just got my vr for Christmas and I already love it. Volleggball was the second game I’ve played and my most played game so far. I think that the teleportation buttons should be the joysticks and you should be able to walk instead of teleport. But overall it’s a great game and I think a bunch of volleyball players would enjoy it
I had my vr for about a year, out of all the games I played this is by far the worst. It takes to long to find a match and the mechanics need serious work

reviews.review_title: Why am i stuck in the floor
reviews.review_description: Im stuck under the map
I loved this game i played it 24/7 and then i found a different game i liked and i quit i came back 4 months later no one was playing this was my everything until then

This is a really fun game to play with others! 
Like serving hitting and blocking
BUT
If you don't have friends to play with or there is no servers online
The bots that you can spawn are bot the greatest for an example even if you have a bot on maximum difficulty the sets are not the best and same with serves.
My rating would be 5 stars if the bot were more advanced!
I like playing this game with friends, the community is really nice, the game play feels smooth to me and it's chill

I was casually playing when admins like daddyhinge or cruzpad joined and called me out for “height glitching” I’m 6’3 and a half in real life and I still got banned for height glitching. You need to do something about these mods. Game keeps cutting out some times as well, would not recommend to a friend, play volley fever instead.
Easy to learn fun community everyone nice and helpful

Vollegball is a great game to play with friends. Playing solo has lots of perks however with friends it is an amazing game. The gameplay is great and is super addictive. Despite the graphics being meh it makes up for it in most other factors.

This review I will make it honest, very good people , bots help a lot ,good lobbies ,but sometimes the ball glitches making us needing to leave and sometimes kicks us out the game but I still love the game very fun wish they added more maps and a bigger court.

This game is amazing the community is nice the kids are also nice. however sometimes you will cross a really toxic person… but the game is fun sometimes there is some lag and delays but the game is very fun and it has tournaments which are very fun. Love this game

I think this is the best game on this platform 
￼
Admin banned me for not knowing how to play

developer_response.body:
Thank you for sharing your experience with us. We’re sorry to hear that you had a negative experience and felt unfairly treated. However, we want to provide some important context regarding this situation.

In Volleggball, many players prefer to follow standard volleyball rules to ensure fair and enjoyable gameplay for everyone. For example, blocking a serve is generally not allowed in real volleyball as it can disrupt the flow of the game. It seems there may have been some miscommunication or misunderstanding about these expectations during your session.

That said, we must also address that multiple players reported instances of bullying and hateful behavior during your time in the lobby. Our moderators take such reports seriously to maintain a safe and welcoming environment for all players. The temporary 30-minute ban was issued not only due to gameplay concerns but also in response to these reports. We encourage all players to treat each other with respect and kindness while participating in the game.

We’d love to see you return and continue playing, but we kindly ask that you respect other players and adhere to community guidelines moving forward. Volleggball is a team-based game, and fostering positive interactions is key to everyone’s enjoyment. If you have any questions or need guidance on gameplay rules, feel free to reach out—we’re here to help!

Thank you for your understanding,
Volleggball Team

reviews.review_description: On my first time playing I asked if anyone could teach me but I tried playing when no-one taught me and everyone started swearing at me
Met the best people ever in this gameee, you meet so many new friends and faces and it’s overall sooooo funnnnnn
Big dicks do you like dicks
I wanna get a refund cause my game did not work properly

developer_response.body:
Sorry about that. We would really like to know why you didn't like it, and we could do anything to improve. You are welcome to share with us on the discord.
For a refund, feel free to see with Meta about their refund policy.

reviews.review_description: You can’t even bump or set correctly it physically impossible. The game is sooooo bad like why are we eggs, eggs don’t play volley ball and that just makes it worst.
I hate it is so glichy the ball never ever one in a life time goes where I hit it delete this off the oculus store no one likes it

developer_response.body:
Hello!
Thanks for your comment! 
May I know what's the matter? 
If you're having troubles passing or hitting the ball, don't hesitate to try out the tutorials! 
If there is a technical issue, please contact us directly in our Discord: discord.gg/NvRjfSnmma
Have a wonderful day!

reviews.review_description:
This game is the closest thing to volleyball in VR I've come across. It's very fun to play. A couple of things that I would recommend adding:

1. Walking mechanics (I've heard they are working on this.
2. Multiplayer online
3. Hand/arm mechanism (being able to form a fist or hit the ball with your inner arms.
4. Difficulty setting (once you get the basics now it  becomes quite easy)
5. Ranking system (this is what makes a game like this super addictive) 
6. Different areas (altough this one looks super great already)

Keep up the good work and thanks for this dope game!

developer_response.body: Thank you so much for your great feedback ! I'm really happy you enjoyed the game, and your recommendations are really helpful! And it confirms we are on the right track, as this is really close to our roadmap for 2021 :)

reviews.review_description: I haven’t played it yet but I know it’s gonna be good cause I love volleyball and I play it!
I thought the idea was wonderful, but I found it very difficult to hit the ball in the right direction and with the correct intent, I think there is a lack of refinement at this point.

developer_response.body: Thank you for your feedback! Usually, it gets better with some training, using the tutorial and after few games. Please come on our discord to discuss that, we would really appreciate to have more detail, and discover how we can improve !

reviews.review_description: I play this game a lot and it’s really fun. But there’s a few things that could be fixed. One example is when the ball hits the floor and starts rolling it starts glitching and making this loud sound. Another example is sometimes the eggs don’t move. One time when I was playing I passed it to my egg teammate and it didn’t quite make it but it could’ve walked and instead it started jumping continuously for 2 rounds and wouldn’t move until after. Again, it’s a good game and I really enjoy it but I would enjoy it more if there were fixes.

developer_response.body:
Hello ! Thank you very much for your review and we're so glad that you still have fun with Volleggball !
As for the bugs, we are of course trying our best to work on them. Since we're a very small studio it can take some time, but eventually they'll be fixed ! We're working on the multiplayer feature for now but as soon as we're done with it we're taking care of it !

reviews.review_description: I think this game is really fun, its just the moving mechanics. I don't know how to change it to the thumbstick mod because it wont let me when I hit the x in the box under the setting: activate thumbstick. I cant play with the teleport mechanic.

developer_response.body: Changing controls require file access, you should have received a request for it at game start. If refused, an error message appears when trying to change the parameter. You can also allow file access in game parameters on the quest menu.

reviews.review_description: Really enjoy the game so far and can tell there’s a lot of potential, I know you’ve definitely heard this before but it definitely needs multiplayer and I assume the devs are working on it for the future. Just a matter of time of when it gets released. The bots are fine but playing alone can only give so much enjoyment, once multiplayer is released, this game will earn 5* no doubt. Besides that I love it and it feels pretty realistic for a volleyball vr game.

developer_response.body: Thank you for your comment ! Indeed we are working on multiplayer, as you said, just a matter of time !

reviews.review_description: Wont let me reinstall

developer_response.body:
Sorry about that. We noticed we sometime need to uninstall/reinstall, so the game completely redownload. If it doesn't solve your issue, please reach us on discord https://discord.gg/4QcFZPnfBj so we can help you.

edit: we had the same issue few hours ago, but now the game installs properly. It may have been an issue with Meta servers, please try again and tell us if you can now play the game.

reviews.review_description: This game is fun but gets repetitive, would be fun with friend. I know you are working on this. I also found a bug. Using the snap turn, you can go into the other teams side. Other than those, good game.

developer_response.body: Thanks for your comment, nice you had fun!  We just opened for preorders so everybody can help us building multiplayer faster!

reviews.review_description: I suck at this game lol

developer_response.body: Good to hear you had fun ! Training is all you need now, enjoy !

reviews.review_description: I love this game so much but my single player mode is not working? i don’t know why but i can’t use the custom game function. please fix

developer_response.body: Thank you so much for your feedback, and really sorry about this custom game problem. Could you please join us on discord so we can better understand the problem and help you out ?

reviews.review_description: I like the game but I want to know when multiplayer is coming out and is multiplayer out on the pre order

developer_response.body: Hi Jams, great to see you like Volleggball ! There is still lot of work for multiplayer, and we open for pre-order so everybody could help us building it !

reviews.review_description: It's an amazing game one thing I wish you would fix is the serve the ai could completely leave the serve even tho its closer and sometimes if I'm taking it they come up aswell. The setups can be wierd aswell sometimes they could be perfect or be not within my reach. Other than that the game is amazing and I love playing it jn my freetime

developer_response.body: Thank you Famalam, for enjoying the game and for your feedback ! We will definitely have a look at this bug, and fix it as soon as possible. Have fun !

reviews.review_description: I know this game is still in development but I hope you guys can add a better tutorial like one for spiking or serving and also sometimes the npc will not go for the serve even when I’m on the other side of the court and I was also wondering when multiplayer is coming because I love this game.

developer_response.body: Thank you Gusherman ! game is still in devlopment, but we are currently fixing the "AI sometimes not serving" bug. PLease check the next release ! You will also be able to have time to serve. And multiplayer is on our roadmap, we will post updates !

developer_response.body: Changing controls require file access, you should have received a request for that at game start. If refused, an error message appears when trying to change the parameter. You can also allow file access in game parameters on the quest menu.

reviews.review_description: Get it it’s fun and not hard to learn the game for it being free is a great break from gorilla tag and a good workout highly recommended

developer_response.body: Thank you !

reviews.review_description: Super fun

developer_response.body: Thanks !

reviews.review_title: npcs need a lot of fixing
reviews.review_description: upon playing the game, i enjoyed it. however, when i went to make a custom match, and set my teammate to the highest level, it did not function any better, in fact it got way worse. the npc on your team does not hit the ball 70% of the time, it watches the ball go down and hit the ground. if this is fixed, it will get a higher rating.

developer_response.body: AI have been improved in the last version, please tell us if you still experience this problem. Game is still in development, and we are always improving. You can also join our discord to help us !

reviews.review_description: I was thinking for the other team in the game is for them to actually make it so were their third hit is spiking the ball down. But the game is the best .

developer_response.body: Thank you Maple ! There is sure lot of room to improve the AI. But first we would like to develop multiplayer, then people will then spike way better than any AI :)
